pullRequest.title: [DOM-55522] Aria roles added for aria-label elements

nodes.body: Should we create union to make sure role uses the proper syntax?

as per my understanding, the roles & aria attributes added by Antd is sufficient & the most places where we added aria-label attribute is on `div or span` which are ignored by screen-readers unless it also has a role attribute. The actual interacting elements have aria values set by Antd, so the wrappers might not require these.
